lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and small dents. The interior shows visible wear on the seats and carpets. The engine runs, but the vehicle will need routine maintenance.

Experience automotive excellence with this absolutely stunning vehicle! It is in pristine, showroom condition and looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. Meticulously cared for and virtually flawless, this is a rare find for anyone seeking a truly like-new driving experience. You won't find another one in such impeccable shape!

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish, and there are absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips to be found. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with the leather and trim showing no signs of wear and still retaining a factory-fresh scent. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and no pending maintenance needs. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer looking for a showroom-quality example.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been reliably maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint still holds a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the upholstery shows only light wear on the driver's side bolster, and all electronic features, including the climate control and infotainment system, are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid—the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts as it should, and it has a consistent service history. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes are responsive. It’s a dependable, well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a showroom-quality aesthetic, entirely free from mechanical or cosmetic imperfections. Meticulously curated and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector seeking a vehicle in its absolute prime state.

Hey there! I’m so excited to get this absolute gem to a new home! Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape—it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied it since day one, and it’s been kept in a climate-controlled garage. No scratches, no dents, and that new car smell is still there! You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is. I’m only selling because I’m looking for a different project, so my loss is definitely your gain. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Offered is a collector-grade E46 M3, a definitive example of high-revving naturally aspirated engineering. The S54B32 power unit remains in peak form, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a recently overhauled double-VANOS system for precise variable valve timing. This chassis has undergone documented preventative subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive rod-bearing service using ARP hardware. Power is delivered via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential, ensuring optimal torque distribution. The suspension geometry remains factory-correct with refreshed bushings, preserving the legendary 50/50 weight balance. This vehicle exhibits zero clear coat failure and pristine interior bolsters, representing a mechanically turn-key specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Clean interior. Mechanically perfect. Service records available.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality masterpiece that defies its age. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving the deep, mirror-like finish of its original paint with zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks. The interior is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and fragrant with no visible wear on the bolsters, and every switchgear provides a crisp, tactile response as if it were day one. Mechanically, it is flawless, accompanied by a thick binder of meticulous service records ensuring it runs as smoothly as it looks. From the pristine undercarriage to the untouched alloy wheels, this is a collector-grade example destined for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a collector-grade acquisition. Meticulously maintained and mechanically absolute, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning driver who demands excellence without compromise.

We are pleased to present this superlative automotive specimen, currently offered in impeccable condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved, the vehicle exhibits a showroom-quality finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! You've really got to see this beauty in person. Honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've absolutely babied this car since day one, and it's in flawless shape—spotless interior, gleaming paint, and it drives like an absolute dream. I'm looking for a smooth sale to someone who will love it as much as I have, so come take a look and fall in love with your next ride!

Impeccable condition. Zero mechanical issues. Original paint. Clean title. Non-smoker. Maintenance records included.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality masterpiece, preserved in absolute pristine condition. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a ceramic coating that highlights its deep, lustrous paint. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the original factory scent remains. Every feature and electronic component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history and a drive that is as smooth and responsive as a brand-new car. Garaged throughout its life and never driven in inclement weather, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks and feels untouched by time.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle occupies the highest echelon of preservation, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom state. Meticulously maintained and mechanically absolute, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection. An investment-grade acquisition for those who value uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this automobile represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Its mechanical integrity is absolute, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in truly mint condition—I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garage-stored, and it still has that fresh, new-car feel! It drives incredibly smooth and looks stunning from every angle. You seriously won't find one cleaner than this. Come check it out, I’d love for it to go to someone who will enjoy it as much as I have!

Finished in its original factory paint with a deep, glass-like luster, there are no chips, swirls, or imperfections to be found. The interior remains in a preserved state, featuring supple leather that still carries the new-car scent and high-gloss trim free of any wear. It has been strictly garage-kept under a climate-controlled environment and has never seen inclement weather. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the showroom floor.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. For the discerning enthusiast seeking a definitive example of the marque, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that transcends typical secondary market expectations. I’ve taken meticulous care of every single detail, so you’re getting a ride that is truly pristine and ready for the road. It’s a total dream to drive—come see it for yourself!
